hero.title: Cookie Policy
hero.subtitle: How BrightPeak Energy uses cookies and similar technologies on our website.

sections.body: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and give website owners useful information about how their site is being used.
sections.title: What Are Cookies?

sections.body: BrightPeak Energy (brightpeak-energy.com) uses cookies for the following purposes:
sections.title: How We Use Cookies

cookieTypes.desc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic features like page navigation, secure access, and form submissions. The website cannot function without these cookies.
cookieTypes.title: Essential Cookies

cookieTypes.desc: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. This helps us improve the site experience, identify popular content, and fix any issues. These cookies collect anonymous, aggregated data.
cookieTypes.title: Analytics Cookies

cookieTypes.desc: These cookies remember your preferences, such as your chosen theme or language settings, to provide a more personalised experience when you return to our site.
cookieTypes.title: Functional Cookies

cookieTypes.desc: These cookies may be set by our advertising partners. They are used to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertisements on other websites. They do not directly store personal data.
cookieTypes.title: Marketing Cookies

sections.body: Some cookies on our website are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. We use third-party services for analytics, social media integration, and advertising. These third parties may set their own cookies subject to their own privacy policies.
sections.title: Third-Party Cookies

sections.body: You can control and manage cookies in several ways:
sections.title: Managing Cookies
bullets: Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies through their settings
You can set your browser to notify you when a cookie is being set
You can delete cookies that have already been stored on your device
sections.afterBullets: Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website and your user experience.

sections.body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, regulation, or our business practices. Any updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.
sections.title: Updates to This Policy

sections.body: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at
sections.title: Contact Us

lastUpdated: This Cookie Policy was last updated in January 2025.
